title: Staten Island DA — Shared Definitions
description: Reusable JSON Schema definitions shared across Office of the District Attorney, Richmond County (Staten Island DA) object schemas. Reconciles fields common to the office's WordPress site (statenislandda.org) — press releases, programs, victim services, scam/safety resources, and the Contact Form 7 tip forms. There is NO NYC Open Data / Socrata presence for this agency, so these definitions are modeled from the public site, not from a dataset. Richmond County is coterminous with the Borough of Staten Island; the Borough enum is kept citywide for cross-domain consistency and future five-borough DA reuse.

Borough.description: NYC borough. For the Richmond County DA this is effectively always 'Staten Island'; enum retained citywide so the model can be reused across all five borough DA offices.

Coordinates.description: WGS84 point (latitude / longitude) for an office, event, or resource location.

Geography.description: The NYC geography spine — the join keys back to the rest of city government. Richmond County spans NYC Council districts 49-51 and Community Boards 1-3.

neighborhood.description: Staten Island neighborhood (e.g. St. George, Stapleton, Tottenville).

ContactInfo.description: A point of contact (bureau, unit, or the person submitting a tip).

SourceRef.description: Provenance back to the public statenislandda.org page a record was modeled from (there is no API or Open Data source today).
